# Petrophysical Rock Typing

**Summary**: The classification of rocks into groups with similar petrophysical properties.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jibrin|Jibrin, 2024]] performed image-based rock typing to categorize the heterogeneity of the pore network.

## Key Results and Findings

- Rock types were categorized based on intensity values, including macropores, grains, and various micropore types. ([[2024-jibrin|Jibrin, 2024, p. 42]])
